---
title: "qCanupo classification"
id: activity-analysis-5
order: 144
summary: "qCanupo classification tutorial."
modules:
  - module-hr-analysis
Goals:
  - module-goals-spat-analysis
materials:
  - materialspat-analysis-6
assessments:
  - assessment-spat-analysis

  - advanced
  - optional
  - YouTube
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/spatial_analysis/activity-analysis-5.md"
---

# Canupo classification in CloudCompare

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8ryh_QyUqH8>

## Connected Module

- [Analysis of high resolution aerial data](../modules/module-hr-analysis.qmd)
